needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Multiset.sort_sorted (r : α → α → Prop) [DecidableRel r] (s : Multiset α) : List.Sorted r (Multiset.sort r s)
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To prove that the sorted list of parts is weakly decreasing, which is needed for the antitone condition of the padded NPartition.
To relate the length of the sorted list to the cardinality of the multiset, used in the padding construction.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Any lemma that relates `List.get` to the element at a given index in a sorted list; needed to extract the i-th part.
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To define the i-th part of the padded NPartition from the sorted list.
To show that the sum of the sorted list equals the sum of the multiset, used to prove that the padded NPartition has the correct size.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: If a list is sorted by (· ≥ ·), then the function i ↦ list.get i is antitone on Fin (list.length).
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To prove the antitone condition of the padded NPartition directly from the sorted list.
Used in the forward direction `toPartition` to relate cardinalities; may be needed for the inverse direction.
To reason about the length of the NPartition (which is always N).
Alternative to Finset.card_univ for cardinality of Fin N.
